title: Compliance Evaluation Output
description: Schema for the result of evaluating a requirement against submitted evidence.

evaluation_id.description: Unique identifier for this evaluation result.

mapping_id.description: Cross-standard mapping group this evaluation relates to (if applicable).

matched_evidence_ids.description: Evidence IDs that were matched to this requirement.

missing_evidence.description: Expected evidence types that were not found.

rule_id.description: The rule that produced this evaluation.

details.description: Human-readable explanation of the evaluation outcome.
